title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration and a simple REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; identical surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama endpoints as LLMs, chat models, and embedding providers.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich, open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama—no API keys required.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder APIs, Android compatibility, and Spring starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem exposing Ollama’s REST endpoints idiomatically.

title: ollama-cli (rust)
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with colorful prompts and progress bars.

title: OllamaSharp
summary: .NET library and Blazor demo for chatting with Ollama models using C#.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experiment to run a local GitHub Copilot alternative by pairing Ollama with VS-Code inline completions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for fine-tuning, Docker deployment, function calling, and hardware acceleration.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selectors and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Minimal Alpine-based multi-arch Docker image for running Ollama inside containers on x86 & ARM.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Declarative Nix package and NixOS module for Ollama with automatic CUDA/OpenCL drivers.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package adding Ollama-backed chat and embedding endpoints with admin UI.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for private AI autocomplete and summarization using local Ollama models.
